prompt: A billing report for the quarter: hours logged per client and the invoices we should be sending out.
wire:
<App name="Client & document status (billing data unavailable)">
  <Query id="hostGetDashboard" tool="host_getDashboard" input={{}}/>
  <Query id="hostListClients" tool="host_listClients" input={{}}/>
  <Stack gap={5}>
    <Disclaimer title="Hours and invoice data aren't available" reason="This practice tool tracks tax document collection, client status, and filing deadlines — it has no time-tracking, hours-logged, or invoicing data. A billing report can't be built from the data available here."/>
    <Text variant="heading" text="What is available: client & document status"/>
    <Text variant="body" text="Below is a full client list with document progress and filing deadlines — useful context for prioritising billing conversations."/>
    <Row gap={4}>
      <Stat label="Clients missing documents" value={hostGetDashboard.missingDocumentsCount}/>
      <Stat label="Documents outstanding" value={hostGetDashboard.documentsOutstanding}/>
      <Stat label="Documents received" value={hostGetDashboard.documentsReceived}/>
    </Row>
    <DataTable rows={hostListClients.data} sortBy="filingDeadline asc" searchable filterableBy={["status", "assignedStaff"]} columns={[{ key: "name", label: "Client" }, { key: "entityType", label: "Entity" }, { key: "assignedStaff", label: "Assigned to" }, { key: "status", label: "Status" }, { key: "documentsReceived", label: "Docs received", align: "end" }, { key: "documentsTotal", label: "Docs total", align: "end" }, { key: "filingDeadline", label: "Filing deadline", format: "date" }]} emptyState="No clients found." caption="All clients — sorted by nearest filing deadline"/>
  </Stack>
</App>

props.title: Hours and invoice data aren't available
props.reason: This practice tool tracks tax document collection, client status, and filing deadlines — it has no time-tracking, hours-logged, or invoicing data. A billing report can't be built from the data available here.

props.text: What is available: client & document status
Below is a full client list with document progress and filing deadlines — useful context for prioritising billing conversations.

props.caption: All clients — sorted by nearest filing deadline
